## Safety/privacy review

- [ ] De-identified examples only
- [ ] No credentials/profile/user data
- [ ] No diagnosis, fabrication, concealment, target-rating, or filing behavior
- [ ] Substantive assertions cite registry source IDs
- [ ] Proposed/nonbinding sources labeled

## Validation

- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] bundle validator
- [ ] freshness check
- [ ] changelog/source metadata updated when required
